$schema_description: Altshuller TRIZ Contradiction Matrix (39x39). Each cell maps an (improving_parameter, worsening_parameter) pair to a ranked list of recommended Inventive Principle IDs (1-40). Diagonal cells (improving == worsening) are conventionally empty.

meta.cell_format: cells['<row>,<col>'] = [principle_id, ...] in descending suggested order, or null if not populated.
meta.source_note: The 15 anchor cells below are widely cited in TRIZ literature (Altshuller 1985; Mann 2003). For the full matrix, source from an authoritative reference. For unpopulated cells, the skill agent should reason directly over the 40 principles and clearly mark the suggestion as `Source: inferred` rather than `Source: matrix`.
meta.primary_source: Altshuller, G.S. (1985). Contradiction Matrix, full table in 'Creativity as an Exact Science' (Russian original 1979, English 1984).
